link_repair.note: Stale or renamed public URLs are repaired to working source pages before publication. Links are not removed as a substitute for repair.

public_link_access.note: Public link access means every published evidence row has a verified browser-openable URL or a visible source-access note. It is not the same as raw-source or completion-guard access.
Public link access means every published evidence row has a verified browser-openable URL or a visible source-access note. It is not the same as raw-source or completion-guard access.

source_access.note: Source access combines public-link access, completion-guard access, and deep source-acquisition blockers. Verified links do not clear unresolved acquisition blockers, and missing source access is never treated as completion.

unverified_link_access.note: Broken or blocked public URLs are not published as live links. They are preserved as unlinked source-access references, and the evidence row remains visible for reviewer repair.
